A'JA WILSON DOMINATES IN ROAD W 🤩 | WNBA on ESPN
Watch highlights as A'ja Wilson, the reigning MVP, puts on a show in San Francisco against the Golden State Valkyries. Wilson finished with 28 PTS, 15 REB, 4 AST and 4 BLK in 34 minutes.

author: ESPN YouTube
text:
ELIMINATION GAME 🥎 Nebraska vs. Texas | Full Game Highlights | Women’s College World Series
Watch the highlights as the No. 2 Texas Longhorns defeat the No. 4 Nebraska Cornhuskers, 3-1, to advance to the semifinals of the Women’s College World Series. Katie Stewart hit a 3-run home run in the bottom of the 6th inning to give the Longhorns the victory. Nebraska’s Jordy Frahm hit a home run to open up the game and had a no-hitter through 5 innings. 

✔️ Subscribe to ESPN Unlimited: https://plus.espn.com/
